description_long: This object is a dark, single-edged blade with a straight profile and a slightly tapered point, resembling a utilitarian or historical knife. The blade surface appears rough and unpolished, with visible texture and irregularities, suggesting it may be forged or hand-crafted from metal. The handle is short, cylindrical, and minimally contoured, with a rounded pommel at the end, lacking any visible grip wrapping or ergonomic shaping. There is no visible guard or crossguard separating the blade from the handle, giving it a simple, functional appearance. The coloration is predominantly dark gray to black, with subtle variations in tone along the blade and handle. No decorative elements or ornamentation are present, and the object is entirely solid with no visible sheath or covering.
description: A rough, dark, single-edged knife with a straight blade and a simple, rounded handle, lacking ornamentation or a guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight, single-edged blade and the rounded handle.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the cylindrical shape of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade's rough texture and the handle's rounded pommel.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, emphasizing the blade's thickness and the handle's profile.
attribute_handle_design: short, cylindrical, rounded pommel, unwrapped, plain metal
